headline: Why Texas Instruments (TXN) Is Up 7.0% After $30 Billion Fab Bet And Silicon Labs Deal
summary: In late March 2026, Texas Instruments reported that Senior Vice President Hagop Kozanian plans to retire in August 2026 while the company continues to raise analog chip prices amid higher input costs and participates in a proposed US-led trillion-dollar supply chain consortium for energy, minerals, and semiconductors. At the same time, Texas Instruments has highlighted very large growth in data center sales, committed about US$30.00 billion to an in-house fabrication facility in Texas, and...
